auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to access the console.
auth.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in {seconds} second(s).

addresses.title: Addresses
addresses.subtitle: Nominatim addresses associated with drives and charges.

hints.displayName: Text shown on detail page (max 512 chars).
hints.osmReadOnly: These OSM identifiers are indexed: changing them does not update the matching Nominatim record.
hints.rawPaste: Paste a Nominatim JSON payload. Validated via JSON.parse on both client and server.

delete.title: Delete this address?
delete.description: {drives} drive(s) and {charging} charging process(es) will have their address_id set to NULL. This cannot be undone.

errors.uniqueOsm: Another address already uses this (osm_id, osm_type) pair.
errors.invalidRaw: Raw JSON field is not a valid JSON object.

geofences.title: Geofences
geofences.subtitle: User-defined zones to categorise drives and charges.

delete.title: Delete this geofence?
delete.description: {drives} drive(s) and {charging} charging process(es) will have their geofence_id set to NULL. This cannot be undone.

updates.title: Firmware updates
updates.subtitle: History of firmware updates per vehicle.

hints.endDate: Leave blank if the update is still ongoing.
hints.endAfterStart: End date must be greater than or equal to start date.

delete.title: Delete this update?
delete.description: This cannot be undone. The update record will be removed.

errors.endBeforeStart: End date cannot be earlier than start date.
errors.noCar: No vehicle available. Import a car before creating an update.

cars.title: Vehicles
cars.subtitle: Cars tracked by TeslaMate and their settings.
cars.deleteUnavailable: Deletion unavailable: cascading a vehicle delete would wipe the entire history (drives, charges, positions, states, updates). Run this manually in the database if truly required.

hints.displayPriority: Lower numbers are shown first in views that support multiple cars.
hints.efficiency: Wh per km. Updated automatically by TeslaMate from drives.
hints.suspendMin: Delay before TeslaMate stops polling to let the car sleep (default 21 min).
hints.suspendAfterIdleMin: Required idle time before attempting to suspend (default 15 min).
hints.reqNotUnlocked: If enabled, TeslaMate will only try to suspend when the vehicle is locked.
hints.useStreamingApi: Subscribes to the Tesla streaming API for drives.
hints.lfpBattery: Tick if the battery is LFP (lithium iron phosphate). Affects SOC computation.

hints.language: TeslaMate language code (e.g. fr, en). Separate from the TeslaMateFix UI locale.
hints.baseUrl: Public URL of the TeslaMate instance (used in notifications).

states.title: States
states.subtitle: online / offline / asleep history per vehicle.

hints.endDate: Leave blank if the state is still ongoing.
hints.endAfterStart: End date must be greater than or equal to start date.
hints.openState: Only one state can stay open (no end date) per vehicle at a time.

closePrevious.label: Automatically close the previous state
closePrevious.description: A state is still open for this vehicle. Tick this box to close it at 1 second before the new state.

delete.title: Delete this state?
delete.description: This cannot be undone. The state record will be removed.

errors.endBeforeStart: End date cannot be earlier than start date.
errors.openStateExists: A state is already open for this vehicle. Tick "close previous" or set an end date.
errors.noCar: No vehicle available. Import a car before creating a state.
